steps.title: Identify the operation needed
steps.content: We have the equation $w + 7 = 357$. To solve for $w$, we need to isolate the variable. Since we have $w + 7$, we need to undo the addition of 7 by subtracting 7 from both sides.

steps.title: Subtract 7 and solve for w
steps.content: Subtracting 7 from both sides of the equation: $$w = 357 - 7 = 350$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
